blockers.description: agents/src/trader/ does not exist. The trader pipeline (orchestrator, schemas, CLI, yfinance_client) referenced in the task spec has not been implemented in this repo. Only agents/src/firefly/ is present.
blockers.remediation: Implement trader pipeline under agents/src/trader/ with cli.py, orchestrator.py, tools/yfinance_client.py, and the scan/research sub-commands.

blockers.description: Environment network policy blocks all outbound HTTP. yfinance.Ticker().history() and .info all return HTTP 403 'Host not in allowlist'. No live or historical price data can be fetched.
blockers.remediation: Run the daily trader job in an environment with outbound network access to finance.yahoo.com, or pre-cache price data inside the repo. Alternatively, configure the network allowlist for finance.yahoo.com, query1.finance.yahoo.com.

blockers.description: No wiki/synthesis/daily-trader-*.md exists. This is the first run, so there are no prior recommendations to backtest.
blockers.remediation: No action needed on first run. Future runs will backtest against this stub page (or the first real scan page once blockers are resolved).

watchlist_seed.source: task-spec core set + AI/semiconductor additions from wiki corpus
watchlist_seed.rationale: Core 8 from spec; SMCI/PLTR/AVGO/ARM/CRM/INTC/QCOM added as AI-infrastructure and semiconductor names prominent in the wiki's ODC/rad-hard/phased-array/open-weight-LLM corpus. Total=15 (cap per spec).
